grades.expectation: Response provides a structured checklist of pre-exchange items
grades.reason: Clear structured format with numbered sections and detailed summary checklist at end

grades.expectation: Response mentions specific protocol stages or sections
grades.reason: References Law Society Conveyancing Protocol 6th Edition and specific elements like Formula B exchange

grades.expectation: Response covers key items: searches currency, mortgage offer, deposit, insurance, signed contracts
grades.reason: Missing searches currency - covers mortgage offer, deposit, insurance, signed contracts but no mention of search validity or currency

grades.expectation: Response references the protocol as source (not just general best practice)
grades.reason: Consistently references Law Society Conveyancing Protocol throughout as the authoritative source for requirements
